economic_notes: Investments in limited partnerships: Mi'kmaq Resource Development Partnership (wind energy), E'sukutimkewey Limited Partnership (surf clam industry), ANSMC Cannabis Holdings Partnership (cannabis). Gas bar, tobacco shop, gift shop, Cleanwave Restaurant, fisheries (treaty and commercial), gaming operations under Nova Scotia Gaming Agreement.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 (not 2024). Four consolidated entities: Wagmatcook First Nation Operating and Capital Funds, Trust Funds, Wagmatcook Enterprise Heritage and Community Complex, Wagmatcook Education Authority Limited. Three limited partnerships accounted for at cost (not consolidated): MRDP (wind energy), ELP (surf clam), ANSMC Cannabis Holdings. Intangible assets of $14,395,680 represent purchased fishing licenses not amortized. Large deferred revenue balance of $3,974,465 driven by significant federal capital project funding. Current liabilities calculated as operating loans $278,571 plus accounts payable $2,019,286. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. OSR includes economic activities (gas bar, fisheries commercial, tobacco, gaming, heritage complex) and interest/rent/other totalling approximately $12.5M.
